display.purpose: Landing page hero headlines. One per major section.

headline.purpose: Section headers on landing, H2 in docs.

title.purpose: H3 in docs, feature headings, card labels.

body.purpose: All prose. Max 65–75ch line length on docs pages.

label.purpose: Nav items, tags, button text, metadata.

shadows.name: focus-halo
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus ring on interactive elements on the light surface.

shadows.name: ambient-lift
shadows.purpose: shadow-xs — minimal shadow on default, outline, and secondary buttons. Structural, not decorative.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for color/opacity state transitions.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Entrance animations and hover lifts. Exponential exit.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action. Used for Get Started, Submit, and key CTAs on the light docs surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: oklch(0.205 0.06 130); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.24 0.06 130); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.205 0.06 130 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Landing CTA Button
components.description: Get Started CTA on the dark landing page. White on dark — inverts the primary pattern.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-landing-cta">Get Started <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-landing-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; background: #f8fafc; color: #020617; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-landing-cta:hover { background: #e2e8f0; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Nav-adjacent actions and secondary choices. No border, no background at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.55 0.02 130); font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0.01 130); color: oklch(0.141 0.005 130); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Border + background, same radius as primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.141 0.005 130); font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.01 130); cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0.01 130); border-color: oklch(0.88 0.01 130); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.205 0.06 130 / 0.5); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Stroke border, focus ring treatment, no fill on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.141 0.005 130); font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.01 130); transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.55 0.02 130); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.205 0.06 130); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.205 0.06 130 / 0.5); } .ds-input[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.2); }

components.name: Dark Surface Card
components.description: Feature card on landing page. Raised from Engine Room, bordered with Circuit Trace.
components.html:
Resources
Declare once in PHP. Get a full React admin interface.
components.css: .ds-card-dark { background: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #334155; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-dark__label { color: #34d399; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-dark__content { color: #cbd5e1; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Docs Navigation Link
components.description: Sidebar nav item in docs. Active state uses primary color. Gently curved hover background.
components.html: InstallationConfigurationResources
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-nav__item { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 8px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.55 0.02 130); border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.1s, color 0.1s; } .ds-nav__item:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0.01 130); color: oklch(0.141 0.005 130); } .ds-nav__item--active { background: oklch(0.97 0.01 130); color: oklch(0.205 0.06 130); font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Landing Navbar
components.description: Fixed header on dark landing page. Frosted dark glass, white logo, slate nav links.
components.html:
Monorail
DocsGitHub
components.css: .ds-landing-nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 50; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; height: 56px; padding: 0 24px; background: rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-landing-nav__logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; text-decoration: none; color: white; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-landing-nav__logo svg { padding: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 6px; } .ds-landing-nav__links { display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-left: 8px; } .ds-landing-nav__links a { padding: 6px 12px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-landing-nav__links a:hover { color: white; } .ds-btn-landing-cta { margin-left: auto; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; background: #f8fafc; color: #020617; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-landing-cta:hover { background: #e2e8f0; }

narrative.overview:
Monorail speaks to a developer who already knows what they're doing. The interface projects authority without performance — a dark cockpit on the landing page, a crisp instrument panel in the docs. Everything here has a job. Nothing decorates.

The landing page lives in near-black (surface-dark, #020617) with a single signal-green accent used with discipline. The docs surface flips to a light, green-tinted neutral system — same hue family, entirely different register. Together they say: this tool was made by people who care about craft, not by a marketing team.

This system explicitly rejects the aesthetics of SaaS launch-week fever: no gradient blobs, no big-number hero metrics, no '10x your workflow' superlatives. No neon-on-black gamer energy. No glassmorphism as decoration. The vibe is closer to a well-maintained Unix man page that happens to look exceptional.
keyCharacteristics: Two surfaces: dark landing (engine room) + light docs (workshop bench)
Single accent color (accent-signal emerald) used sparingly on the dark surface; primary forest-green on light
Code-forward: real, readable PHP examples carry more weight than copy
Instrument Sans throughout: humanist warmth without softness
Flat by default: no ambient shadows, depth through tonal layering and borders

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: accent-signal (emerald) appears only on the dark landing surface. It never appears in docs or product UI. Its rarity is structural — one green note in a dark room. If it appears everywhere, it means nothing.

rules.name: The Tint Discipline Rule
rules.body: Every light neutral carries hue 130° at chroma ≤0.01. This is not visible as 'green' — it reads as warmth. Never use neutral greys (chroma 0). The tint is load-bearing even when invisible.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: No secondary typeface. All hierarchy through weight (400/600/700) and size scale. If a design needs 'more personality,' add it through color and spacing — not a display font.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state. A design with shadows everywhere has no shadows at all.

dos: Do lead with real PHP code. A TextColumn::make('name')->searchable() example communicates more than three paragraphs about developer experience.
Do use accent-signal (emerald) exclusively on the dark landing surface and exclusively for active/selected states.
Do maintain the hue-130 green tint across all light neutral tokens, even at chroma as low as 0.005.
Do build hierarchy through weight contrast: 400/600/700 at meaningful scale ratios.
Do keep body text to 65–75ch max line length on docs pages.
Do use tonal layering for depth on dark surfaces. No shadows.
Do treat the fake browser chrome in admin mockups as load-bearing.
donts: Don't use big-number hero metrics, gradient blobs, or '10x your workflow' copy.
Don't apply accent-signal (emerald) in the docs or product UI.
Don't use side-stripe border-left accents on cards or list items.
Don't create a design that a reader could identify as belonging to a no-code tool.
Don't use neon-on-black or heavy glassmorphism.
Don't add em dashes to copy.
